'''''Battler''''' was a [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
